rulings.Case Title: MARTIN ENG VS. STEVE M. JEONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motin To Quash Service And Sanction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 16, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTs JASON YOUNG, LAM and LOUISE S.K. (SUED ERRONEOUSLY AS LOUIS S.K.'s Motion To Quash Service And Sanction Hearing Required. All moving Defendants, Plaintiff and Steve Liu are ordered to appear. Request for Sanctions is DENIED. CCP 128.5 is inapplicable to this action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ART WALKER VS. PENNYMAC LOAN SERVICES, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Stay Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 16, 2013, line 8. PLAINTIFF ART WALKER's Motion To Stay Unlawful Detainer DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 526 and show by admissible evidence reasonable probability of prevailing on the merits. Also, moving party fails to address CCP 526(b)(1). = (501/REQ)
